candidate_llm_application: LLM token-cache selective replacement via zeolite-like size-based exchange: replace cached tokens based on representation-space 'size' rather than recency.

results.title: Kv-Cache Eviction Policy: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on KV-cache eviction policy, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
